name: GC - Gold
notes: Primary LW metals instrument. Commercials = miners/producers who hedge by shorting. WillCo 100% = miners covering shorts = bullish.

name: SI - Silver
notes: Similar dynamics to Gold. Often follows Gold but with higher volatility.

name: HG - Copper
notes: Industrial metal. Good economic cycle indicator. Commercials = manufacturers/processors.

name: PL - Platinum
notes: Smaller market than Gold/Silver. Useful for precious metals divergence analysis.

name: PA - Palladium
notes: Small market. Used in catalytic converters. Can have high volatility.

name: MGC - Micro Gold
notes: Same COT data as GC Gold. Set to False to avoid duplicate analysis.

name: ALI - Aluminum
notes: Industrial metal. Set to True if trading aluminum.

name: CL - Crude Oil
notes: High open interest. Commercials = refiners and oil companies.

name: NG - Natural Gas
notes: Seasonal patterns are especially important for Natural Gas.

name: NQ - Nasdaq-100
notes: For indices use Financial report type for better breakdown (Dealers vs Leveraged Funds). Override via report_type_override.

name: ZB - T-Bond 30Y
notes: Bonds need longer lookback (52w) due to slower positioning cycles.

name: 6E - Euro FX
notes: For FX: consider Financial report type (Dealers + Leveraged Funds). Override via report_type_override.

name: BTC - Bitcoin
notes: Change trading_days_mode to 24_7 in user_config.csv for crypto historical periods.

name: CC - Cocoa
notes: Soft commodity (softs). Often affected by West African weather and political risks.

name: KC - Coffee
notes: Softs contract with strong sensitivity to Brazil weather and currency.

name: CT - Cotton
notes: Key benchmark for global cotton prices (ICE US contract).

name: ZW - Wheat
notes: Main benchmark wheat contract

name: ZS - Soybeans
notes: Core oilseed futures

name: LBS - Lumber
notes: CFTC tracks lumber as agricultural commodity; contract historically volatile.

name: HE - Lean Hogs
notes: Livestock; positioning often driven by export demand and disease events.
